description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring large rectangular windows and a light-colored exterior. The structure includes a main building with two visible stories, an attached garage, and an expansive backyard area. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and contains a rectangular swimming pool, a round above-ground pool, and a swing set, suggesting a family-oriented environment. The front of the house has a prominent entryway and a driveway leading up to the garage. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the main facade, with some grouped and others spaced apart. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool, above-ground pool, and swing set. The design is clean and geometric, with a prominent driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, large windows, and the backyard with both pools and a swing set.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, main entrance, driveway, and the full backyard layout.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view displaying the garage, driveway, and the backyard amenities from a different perspective.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the garage, upper balcony, and the connection between the house and the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
